title: stelis campanulifera
intro: Stelis campanulifera, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stelis campanulifera include its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to promote wound healing and alleviate respiratory symptoms.
